children.text: People that you have mutually liked will be shown here. Come back later and chat with them.

Hey John, I'm Catherine and wanted to share a few tips to get you started: Filling out your profile completely helps increase your chances of finding high-quality matches. The question explorer is a unique alternative to our swipe match system. The more questions you answer, the more likely you are to be seen in the explorer! You must answer at least 3 questions in order to be seen by others in the swipe section. Put yourself out there. Those who are the most honest in their profiles tend to get the most responses. Stay active. You'll receive new matches each day you visit. Welcome to Sapio!
